metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM filtering parser for Cisco DNAC Syslog Message
properties.query:
let parser = (
  starttime: datetime=datetime(null), 
  endtime: datetime=datetime(null), 
  username_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  targetappname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  srchostname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  eventtype_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  eventresultdetails_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
  eventresult: string = '*',
  disabled: bool=false) {
let DNACEvents = Syslog
| where not(disabled)
| where ProcessName == "DNAC"
| where 
    (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime) 
    and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
    and ((array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or SyslogMessage has_any (username_has_any))
    and (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0) // TargetAppName not available in source
    and ((array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0) or (has_any_ipv4_prefix(SyslogMessage, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix)))
    and (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0) // SrcHostname not available in source;
    and (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0);  // eventresultdetails not available in source
let LogonEvents = DNACEvents
| where SyslogMessage has "LOGIN_USER_EVENT"
| extend EventType = "Logon";
let LogoffEvents = DNACEvents
| where SyslogMessage has "LOGOFF_USER_EVENT"
| extend EventType = "Logoff";
union LogonEvents, LogoffEvents
| where ((array_length(eventtype_in) == 0) or EventType in~ (eventtype_in))
| extend 
    EventVendor = "Cisco",
    EventProduct = "DNAC",
    EventSchema = "Authentication",
    EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
    EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
    EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
    EventCount = int(1),
    Type = "Syslog"
| extend SyslogJson = parse_json(SyslogMessage)
| extend 
    SrcIpAddr = tostring(SyslogJson.source),
    EventOriginalType = tostring(SyslogJson.name),
    EventOriginalSubType = tostring(SyslogJson.type),
    TargetUsername = tostring(SyslogJson.userId),
    TargetUsernameType = "Simple",
    EventMessage = tostring(SyslogJson.message),
    EventOriginalUid = tostring(SyslogJson.correlationId),
    DvcId = tostring(SyslogJson.instanceId),
    DvcIdType = "Other"
| where ((array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or TargetUsername has_any (username_has_any))
| where ((array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0) or (has_any_ipv4_prefix(SrcIpAddr, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix)))
| extend EventResult = iff(EventMessage has "successfully", "Success", "Failure")
| where (eventresult == "*" or (EventResult == eventresult))
| extend EventSeverity = _ASIM_LookupSyslogSeverityLevel(SeverityLevel)
| project-rename
    TargetIpAddr = HostIP,
    EventOriginalSeverity = SeverityLevel
| extend
    User = TargetUsername,
    Dvc = DvcId,
    IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
    Src = SrcIpAddr
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Type,
    EventType,
    EventVendor,
    EventProduct,
    EventSchema,
    EventSchemaVersion,
    EventStartTime,
    EventEndTime,
    EventCount,
    SrcIpAddr,
    EventOriginalType,
    EventOriginalSubType,
    TargetUsername,
    TargetUsernameType,
    EventMessage,
    EventOriginalUid,
    DvcId,
    DvcIdType,
    EventResult,
    EventSeverity,
    TargetIpAddr,
    EventOriginalSeverity,
    User,
    Dvc,
    IpAddr,
    Src
};
parser(starttime=starttime,
      endtime=endtime,
      username_has_any=username_has_any,
      targetappname_has_any=targetappname_has_any,
      srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
      srchostname_has_any=srchostname_has_any,
      eventtype_in=eventtype_in,
      eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in,
      eventresult=eventresult,
      disabled=disabled);
}
